description:
The binutils package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install binutils
rationale:
<tt>binutils</tt> is a collection of binary utilities required for
foundational system operator activities, such as <tt>ld</tt>,
<tt>nm</tt>, <tt>objcopy</tt> and <tt>readelf</tt>.
ocil_clause: the binutils package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the binutils package is installed: 
$ rpm -q binutils
title: Install binutils Package
